title: SQL Query Crashes Server - CRITICAL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE data_test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO data_test (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL), (4, 'test4');
CREATE TABLE data_1to10 (col2 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT col2, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM data_1to10 GROUP BY col2 ORDER BY row_count DESC, col1);
key_bug_features: SELECT query with ORDER BY on aggregated results
